core_mechanism: an algebraic deformation that replaces the ordinary commutative pointwise product of functions with a non-commutative associative 'star product', paired with a Hopf-algebra coproduct supplying a modified, non-symmetric composition rule for how the parameters of combined elements are merged
brief_reason: The abstract states the proposal is 'essentially based on the introduction of a star product' as a deformed multiplication, together with a coproduct that dictates the (non-symmetric) way the momenta of combined constituents are treated when they enter interaction vertices.
